hero_097.name: Meng_Ya
hero_097.text: mw-content-text" class="mw-body-content"> Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Meng Ya Loose Cannon General Information Lane: Farm Lane Role: Marksman Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 633 Wins : 616 Loses (50.68%) The right mood doubles your firepower! Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Fiery Temper 2.2 Skill 1: Awesome Barrage 2.3 Skill 2: Heavy Shot 2.4 Skill 3: Missile Mayhem 3 Splash Arts Introduction [ edit ] Meng Ya always had a prodigious talent for strategy and mechcraft firearms as a child, which he used to come up with many creative battle plans. This often put him at odds with Meng Tian, his strict father and highly orthodox military commander. However, his father's strict upbringing only lit the fuse of his rebelliousness. Finally, a massive argument ended in him packing his unfinished mechcraft cannons and heading for Jixia Academy, alone. Initially seeing the academy as a refuge, he had no idea of the friendships, recognition, and knowledge he would earn by following his own path in life. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Fiery Temper [ edit ] Fiery Temper Passive Skill Ability Type Enhance Recovery Cooldown is reduced when Attack Speed is increased. Gains Anger when Basic Attack and Skill 1 hit targets. At max Anger, becomes Excited, enhancing all skills. While Excited, surplus Anger restores Health. Skill 1: Awesome Barrage [ edit ] Awesome Barrage Skill 1 Damage Physical Uses the Apocalyptor to strafe continuously and deal damage . Excited : Bullets have a piercing effect, dealing half damage to subsequent enemies. Skill 2: Heavy Shot [ edit ] Heavy Shot Skill 2 Ability Type Slow Damage Physical Shoots a heavy round in the target direction, inflicting damage and slow . Upon hitting an obstacle or reaching its max range, it will split into splinters that deal damage . Excited : Increases the number of splinters. Skill 3: Missile Mayhem [ edit ] Missile Mayhem Skill 3 Damage Physical Scans the vicinity and fires missiles at enemies within range who are attacked by teammates, dealing damage . Excited : Reduces interval between missiles. Splash Arts [ edit ] Global Chinese Show All Loose Cannon Classic Return of Dreams Common Koi Blaster Stonewill Soul 龙鼓争鸣 胡桃狂想曲 百解令 <div class="

hero_099.name: Jing
hero_099.text: mw-content-text" class="mw-body-content"> Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Jing Broken Mirage General Information Lane: Jungler Role: Assassin Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 2099 Wins : 1827 Loses (53.46%) I project myself onto my mirror. Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Lethal Reflections 2.2 Skill 1: Reflective Assault 2.3 Skill 2: Shattered Illusions 2.4 Skill 3: Dimensional Shift 2.5 Skill Ultimate: Mirror Domain 3 Splash Arts Introduction [ edit ] Jing was born to an old enforcer family, receiving rigorous training since her early years. However, her parents went missing mysteriously in the midst of a mission, leaving her and her younger brother, Yao, to fend for themselves. In order to steer clear of enemies lurking in the shadows, Jing buried her familial ties and entered Jixia Academy along with her brother to become stronger. The trials she faced in the Hall of Mirrors in Jixia Academy granted her strength and glory, yet they were just the first step on the difficult path ahead. At least now she knows that, no matter what the future holds for her, she'll never stop moving forward... Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Lethal Reflections [ edit ] Lethal Reflections Passive Skill Ability Type Mark Cooldown Damage Physical Jing and her image apply 2 different types of marks on enemies when they deal damage. If an enemy has both types of mark at the same time, they take damage and the cooldowns of Skill 1 and Skill 2 are reset. Skill 1: Reflective Assault [ edit ] Reflective Assault Skill 1 Ability Type Movement Slow Damage Physical Dashes forward, damaging enemies in her path and slowing them while enhancing her next Basic Attack. If no mirror image is present on the battlefield, one will be created to fight alongside her. Skill 2: Shattered Illusions [ edit ] Shattered Illusions Skill 2 Ability Type Recovery Speed Up Damage Physical Deals damage to nearby enemies while recovering Health and gaining increased Movement Speed . If no mirror image is present on the battlefield, then one will be created to fight alongside her. Skill 3: Dimensional Shift [ edit ] Dimensional Shift Skill 3 Ability Type Movement Switch locations with her mirror image. Stocks up to 4 charges. Skill Ultimate: Mirror Domain [ edit ] Mirror Domain Skill Ultimate Ability Type Movement Immunity Damage Reduction Dashes forward, pulling enemies to the center of her magic circle and immobilizing them there. She gains damage reduction while inside the circle, and recovers Health when she swaps locations. Splash Arts [ edit ] Global Chinese Show All Broken Mirage Classic Ethereal Ice Blade Common Detective Rose True Hertz *Gilded Feather Description Honor of Kings International Championship 2025 commemorative skin * This skin is global-exclusive skin and is not available in China server *Divine Light Description KCC 2020 FMVP NuanYang 's skin 匿光追影者 青焰无极 * This skin hasn't released in global server but appeared in the global server website <div class="

hero_100.name: Agudo
hero_100.text: mw-content-text" class="mw-body-content"> Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Agudo Wild Rider General Information Lane: Jungler Farm Lane Role: Marksman Jungler Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 1672 Wins : 1702 Loses (49.56%) My turf, my rules! Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Mountain Encounter 2.2 Skill 1: Wild Growth 2.3 Skill 2: Tumble, Furball! 2.4 Skill 3: Gorge Mobilization 3 Splash Arts Introduction [ edit ] Agudo is a true child of the wild. Her best friend is a giant creature called Furball, and together they are a force unto themselves even against great armies. Having lived in the dense woods covering the hills of the Three Kingdoms region from a young age, Agudo has become a true expert on all herbs and plant-based medicines, and she can communicate with wild animals and beasts. Agudo can bring large seed bombs to bear on the battlefield—often causing great confusion among her enemies, and call out to the animals of the forest for aid until the forest's despoilers truly understand the power of the mountain. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Mountain Encounter [ edit ] Mountain Encounter Passive Skill Ability Type Release Enhance Damage Physical Replace Recovery with Release . Upon releasing monsters, they grant her Gold, EXP, and their respective blessing . Her Basic Attacks drop Seed Mines. Skill 1: Wild Growth [ edit ] Wild Growth Skill 1 Ability Type Summon Speed Up Agudo grants Movement Speed and Health recovery to herself and summons in target area, and summons multiple monsters at the center. Skill 2: Tumble, Furball! [ edit ] Tumble, Furball! Skill 2 Ability Type Speed Up Immunity Damage Physical Rolls forward, dealing damage to nearby enemies. Gains immunity against 1 hard crowd control, and damages and launches enemies hit. Skill 3: Gorge Mobilization [ edit ] Gorge Mobilization Skill 3 Ability Type Summon Crowd Control Damage Physical Summons Furball to leap to the target direction, inflicting damage and crowd control. Furball then fights independently. Splash Arts [ edit ] Global Chinese Show All Wild Rider Classic Panda Keeper Common Rain Play River Spirits 布丁狗之约 <div class="

hero_101.name: Sakeer
hero_101.text: mw-content-text" class="mw-body-content"> Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Sakeer Brushstrider General Information Lane: Roamer Role: Support Mage Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 640 Wins : 658 Loses (49.31%) I travel far, across mountains and rivers, while galaxies fill the sky. Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Firefly Protection 2.2 Skill 1: Mulberry Power 2.3 Skill 2: Ride the Wind 2.4 Skill 3: Firefly Fields 3 Splash Arts Introduction [ edit ] Sakeer hails from a secluded land known as Ghabet Firefly. His tribespeople, separated from the outside world for countless generations, were full of curiosity about the lands beyond their borders. In search of stories about these mysterious locales, Sakeer crossed the Forbidden Lands and set off on a journey of exploration. However, when he returned, he found his home long gone. Rather than wallowing in misery, he chose to follow in his father's footsteps. He sat down by the withered tree that his people had cherished and told the stories he had gathered as if everyone was still there. As he did so, fireflies lit up the night sky. Carrying the fireflies' light with him as memories of his home, he embarked on a fresh journey to document new tales. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Firefly Protection [ edit ] Firefly Protection Passive Skill Ability Type Heal Vision Damage Magic Basic Attacks and skills summon fireflies that deal extra damage to enemies and grant vision of them. Periodically heals teammates, or can charge up his Basic Attack to heal himself instead. He will stop restoring Health to teammates while charging. Skill 1: Mulberry Power [ edit ] Mulberry Power Skill 1 Ability Type Crowd Control Heal Damage Magic Launches and damages enemies in front while summoning fireflies to heal teammates or damage enemies. Luminescence (Firefly) : He gain stack periodically where the skill's range increased based on number of stacks. Skill 2: Ride the Wind [ edit ] Ride the Wind Skill 2 Ability Type Movement Heal Damage Magic Flies to a brush while summoning fireflies that heal teammates or damage enemies. Skill 3: Firefly Fields [ edit ] Firefly Fields Skill 3 Ability Type Brush Heal Damage Magic Summons a brush and can fly into it by using this skill again. The brush summons fireflies over time that heal teammates or damage enemies. Enemies that step into the brush will reveal their location . Splash Arts [ edit ] Global Chinese Show All Brushstrider Classic Painted Travels Common Seabreeze Drifter Starlit Voyage Verdant Serenity 青衿临川 <div class="

hero_102.name: Charlotte
hero_102.text: mw-content-text" class="mw-body-content"> Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Charlotte Rose Fencer General Information Lane: Clash Lane Jungler Dark Slayer Lane Role: Fighter Warrior Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Official AoV Hero Page Esports Statistics 2118 Wins : 2207 Loses (48.97%) We cherish glory, but not the glory of the past. Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: SPLASH GRADATION 2.2 Skill 1: TRI-SLASH 2.3 Skill 2: SPLASH FOUNT 2.4 Skill 3: POWER GRADATION 3 Biography 4 Splash Arts Introduction [ edit ] Elegant and beautiful, Charlotte is a knight of noble heritage from Sunset. Her ancestors came from across the sea, and after several generations of business dealings, her family established its reputation within Sunset. Now, a series of tragic events have stirred up chaos in the city. To defend her family's pride and honor, Charlotte has decided to follow the trail to Kyokutou and hopefully find the source behind all this chaos. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: SPLASH GRADATION [ edit ] SPLASH GRADATION Passive Skill Ability Type Enhance Damage Physical After any skill hits an enemy, her next different skill used will be enhanced to a follow-up skill. Additionally, gains 1 stack of mark , for up to 5 stacks. Consuming 3 stacks will enhance her next Basic Attack. Skill 1: TRI-SLASH [ edit ] TRI-SLASH Skill 1 Ability Type Speed Up Damage Physical Follow-up Skill: After a shorter delay, unleashes TRI-SLASH, dealing damage to enemies and increasing her Movement Speed . Initial Skill: After a short delay, releases TRI-SLASH in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies and increasing her Movement Speed . Skill 2: SPLASH FOUNT [ edit ] SPLASH FOUNT Skill 2 Ability Type Movement Recovery Damage Physical Initial Skill: Dashes in the target direction, while striking several times. Recovers Health each time damage is dealt. Follow-Up Skill: Dashes in the target direction while striking several times. Recovers Health each time damage is dealt. Skill 3: POWER GRADATION [ edit ] POWER GRADATION Skill 3 Ability Type Crowd Control Immunity Damage Reduction Damage Physical Initial Skill: Carves a seven-pointed star around her, dealing damage and slowing nearby enemies. Gains crowd control immunity and damage reduction while the skill is active. Follow-up skill: Carves a seven-pointed star more quickly, dealing damage and slowing enemies. Gains crowd control immunity and damage reduction while the skill is active. When the star is formed, deals extra damage and launches enemies in the center. Biography [ edit ] Charlotte is the most capable of the heirs to a noble family in Sunset. Her ancestors carved out their territory from the treacherous waves with their extreme courage and persistence, and accumulated glory for generations through countless conflicts against other cities and battles against pirates. She achieved one victory after another in duels between nobles, and left red roses to the defeated as a gift. But misfortune struck the family one day. Ships that received orders to sail eastward kept sinking around the Tonpuu Shore, and these incidents triggered unrest in the city, as the families of the missing crew begged for explanations, and merchants that suffered huge losses banded together to demand compensation. Many knights, who came to serve the family because they admired the family's reputation, chose to depart. The pirates also assembled and launched an attack on the family, who failed to defend themselves. The pirates took over the villas, and the remaining family members decided to pay a ransom to salvage what little glory they have left. Only Charlotte refused, because to a noble, losing honor was worse than death Before they reached an agreement with the pirates, she paid a visit to the pirate ship with her sword. After a full night of fighting, she defeated every single pirate and exiled them from the city. But things didn't end there. No one knew why the ship

hero_103.name: Yun_Ying
hero_103.text: mw-content-text" class="mw-body-content"> Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Ying Firespear General Information Lane: Jungler Role: Fighter Assassin Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 308 Wins : 351 Loses (46.74%) This spear burns bright like the fire in my heart! Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Spear Will - Sweeping Fire 2.2 Skill 1 2.2.1 Moonslash 2.2.2 Stalwart - Peacemaker 2.3 Skill 2 2.3.1 Cloudchaser 2.3.2 Zealous - Devastation 2.4 Skill 3 2.4.1 Starburn 2.4.2 Zenith - Wildfire 3 Splash Arts Introduction [ edit ] Ying is a rising talent at the Dali High Court in Chang'an. Hailing from a famous family, this young girl now works to maintain public order in the city with her spear. It's just that, although she genuinely wants to help solve people's problems, she does tend to create a few as well... Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Spear Will - Sweeping Fire [ edit ] Spear Will - Sweeping Fire Passive Skill Ability Type Enhance Cooldown Skills grant marks (up to 3 stacks), and different stacks upgrade the following Basic Attacks into different skills. Skill 1 [ edit ] Moonslash [ edit ] Moonslash Skill 1 Ability Type Crowd Control Damage Physical Deals damage to enemies in the target area and launches them. Stalwart - Peacemaker [ edit ] Stalwart - Peacemaker Skill 1 Ability Type Shield Damage Physical Continuously deals damage to enemies within range and gains a shield . Skill 2 [ edit ] Cloudchaser [ edit ] Cloudchaser Skill 2 Ability Type Movement Speed Up Damage Physical Dashes in the target direction and sweeps at enemies, dealing damage and slowing them. Charging up enhances the damage and applies additional effects. Zealous - Devastation [ edit ] Zealous - Devastation Skill 2 Ability Type Recovery Damage Physical Delivers 3 consecutive attacks, dealing damage and recovering Health. Skill 3 [ edit ] Starburn [ edit ] Starburn Skill 3 Ability Type Dash Crowd Control Immunity Damage Physical Dashes back and forth in the target direction, dealing damage and launches enemies, while gaining crowd control immunity and damage reduction . Using the skill again while dashing will interrupt the dash and deal damage over time in the target area. Zenith - Wildfire [ edit ] Zenith - Wildfire Skill 3 Ability Type Enhance Damage Physical Gains Movement Speed and damage reduction , and can ignore terrain . Then deals damage to enemies. Splash Arts [ edit ] Global Chinese Show All Firespear Classic Crimson Tassel Common Crystallight Spear Horse of High Peaks 鹤归松栖 赞萌露比 <div class="

hero_104.name: Feyd
hero_104.text: mw-content-text" class="mw-body-content"> Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Feyd Featherfoot General Information Lane: Jungler Role: Assassin Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 474 Wins : 496 Loses (48.87%) I'm enjoying myself. Who cares about right and wrong? Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Jade Carriage - View from Above 2.2 Skill 1: Jade Chase - Returning Strike 2.3 Skill 2: Stepping on Jade 2.4 Skill 3: Hardened Jade Seal 3 Splash Arts Introduction [ edit ] Feyd has become a household name in Jade City for a number of reasons: his profligate spending, heir to the throne, and the infamous lack of fixed employment as beneficiary of the public purse. His subjects likely don't realize the same happy-go-lucky prince is, in fact, one of his city's most tireless defenders on a never-ending quest to uncover its darkest secrets. Naturally, he ignores all such rumors out of his preoccupation with the fight against injustice. Indeed, a look over the city walls at night might just reveal the unrestrained figure of a dashing prince. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Jade Carriage - View from Above [ edit ] Jade Carriage - View from Above Passive Skill Ability Type Wall Walk Speed Up Can jump onto and walk on natural walls. Basic Attack becomes ranged while on a wall. While on top of a wall, his Stepping on Jade skill stock uses faster , increasing field of vision , and crowd controls lasts longer . Skill 1: Jade Chase - Returning Strike [ edit ] Jade Chase - Returning Strike Skill 1 Ability Type Movement Crowd Control Damage Physical Dashes , dealing damage to enemies in his path and launching them. Enhances his next 3 Basic Attacks. Melee on Ground : Enhanced Basic Attacks deal extra damage and restore Health . Ranged on Top of the Wall : Enhanced Basic Attacks deal extra damage and bounces to nearest unit within range on hit. Skill 2: Stepping on Jade [ edit ] Stepping on Jade Skill 2 Ability Type Movement Jumps onto the target wall. While on the wall, fly and jump from current wall to target wall. Skill 3: Hardened Jade Seal [ edit ] Hardened Jade Seal Skill 3 Ability Type Grievous Jadeify Damage Physical Damages and marks nearby enemies. Using the skill again unleashes 4 strikes of damage (Hardened Jade Strike). The last strike will defeat marked enemies with low health. Can use to jump down from walls . Splash Arts [ edit ] Featherfoot Classic Jade Aristocrat Common Stellar Vigilante Gilded Burial Byakuya Kuchiki <div class="

hero_105.name: Alessio
hero_105.text: mw-content-text" class="mw-body-content"> Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Alessio Red Hawk General Information Lane: Farm Lane Role: Marksman Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 173 Wins : 213 Loses (44.82%) I shall carry on the legend with my heroic deeds! Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Rebellious Little Hawk 2.2 Skill 1: Upgraded Shell 2.3 Skill 2: Legendary Hero Debut 2.4 Skill 3: Sunset Fireworks Show 3 Splash Arts 4 See Also Introduction [ edit ] Alessio was originally a small fry in the Outer City of Navenia. However, when fate called, he accepted a request from the legendary Captain Red Hawk to put on his mask and become a "copycat" of the great hero of the people. Later, when the people learned that he was just masquerading as the original Captain Red Hawk, he was forced to figure out who he really wanted to be... Now, with his mask off, he still gallivants about with his cannon, protecting the peace of the Outer City with his customized cannon shells. If you run into any problems, he will be sure to stand up for you, even if it's against the city's ruler... Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Rebellious Little Hawk [ edit ] Rebellious Little Hawk Passive Skill Damage Physical Basic Attacks deal area damage and extra physical damage . Skill 1: Upgraded Shell [ edit ] Upgraded Shell Skill 1 Damage Physical Enhances his next 3 Basic Attacks to deal extra physical damage in a greater area. Skill 2: Legendary Hero Debut [ edit ] Legendary Hero Debut Skill 2 Ability Type Airborne Stealth Speed Up Throws a smoke bomb, creating a cloud of smoke that grants stealth to teammates within it, including himself. The bomb's explosion sends him airborne , and his Basic Attacks allow him to stay airborne longer. Skill 3: Sunset Fireworks Show [ edit ] Sunset Fireworks Show Skill 3 Ability Type Airborne Immunity Damage Physical Leaps into the air and fires several shells, each shell dealing physical damage to the target in the area. Up to 1 enemy can take a shell for the target. Splash Arts [ edit ] Global Chinese Show All Red Hawk Classic Wildtown Sheriff Doomsday Mecha Heaven Pulse 踏浪烽翎 See Also [ edit ] Moren (Alessio's AoV counterpart) <div class="

hero_106.name: Luara
hero_106.text: mw-content-text" class="mw-body-content"> Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Luara Firesnake General Information Lane: Farm Lane Role: Marksman Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 19 Wins : 28 Loses (40.43%) It is I who will bring order to Rainbow Bay! Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Serpent's Envoy 2.2 Skill 1: Deadly Fang 2.3 Skill 2: Furtive Attack 2.4 Skill 3: Blazing Glare 3 Splash Arts 3.1 Landscape/Horizontal Version Introduction [ edit ] A remnant of the Fire Serpent, a Skyhome orphan, a Rainbow Bay gang member, a nobody rolling around in a pile of ashes... Luara has had many identities, but now she has found her life's purpose.Her red cloak is her symbol of honor and the only reminder of her warm past.She shall bring the power of the Fire Serpent to Rainbow Bay to cleanse it of evil. The Fire Serpents will stand tall on this land once again! Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Serpent's Envoy [ edit ] Serpent's Envoy Passive Skill Ability Type Enhance Damage Physical Basic Attacks unleash serpent blades to deal damage , reducing Skill 1's cooldown for every enemy hit. Skill 1: Deadly Fang [ edit ] Deadly Fang Skill 1 Ability Type Bypass Terrain Speed Up Enhance Activates a serpent blade and gains Movement Speed . She can quickly scales walls should she run into them during this period. Skill 2: Furtive Attack [ edit ] Furtive Attack Skill 2 Ability Type Slow Damage Magic Summons the Fire Serpent at the target location, which then moves toward her, damaging and slowing enemies in its path. If serpent blades are active, it deals additional damage to enemies. If not, the cooldown is reduced. Skill 3: Blazing Glare [ edit ] Blazing Glare Skill 3 Ability Type Blind Crowd Control Enhance Damage Magic Releases the Fire Serpent in the target direction, dealing damage and blinding enemies in its path, and gains a serpent blade. During this time, both attacking and being attacked will accumulate Fury. At full Fury, deals area damage and launches enemies. Splash Arts [ edit ] Landscape/Horizontal Version [ edit ] Global Chinese Show All Firesnake Classic Beat of the Street Inferno Spectacle 蛇焰使者 Classic (卢雅那) <div class="

hero_107.name: Ata
hero_107.text: mw-content-text" class="mw-body-content"> Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Ata White Anchor General Information Lane: Dark Slayer Lane Roamer Clash Lane Jungler Role: Tank Tank Official HoK Global Hero Page Official AoV Hero Page Esports Statistics 374 Wins : 390 Loses (48.95%) If you board my ship, you're mine! (AoV) / It's my ship! Do as you're told! (HoK) Contents 1 Profile (Arena of Valor Version) 2 Biography (Honor of Kings Version) 3 Skills 3.1 Passive Skill: Child of the Sea 3.2 Skill 1: Wavewalking 3.3 Skill 2: Sea Anchor 3.4 Skill 3: Ghost Ship 4 Splash Arts 5 See Also Profile (Arena of Valor Version) [ edit ] DOB - 8 Aug; Height - 175 cm; Birth Place - Free Federation Status: Pirate, Carano Magic Academy Student Info: Ata loves to exercise and spends at least five hours working out daily. Ata is familiar with the seas and is able to understand sea creatures. Secret: Ata is unable to stay still for more than 10 minutes in front of his desk. Ata has a huge appetite, and his favorite food is char-grilled beef. Ata likes girls who are as simple as he. Better still, someone who is more dense. Biography (Honor of Kings Version) [ edit ] The orphan Ata spent most of his time as a young boy working as a longshoreman and dreaming of traveling the high seas. His wish became reality when he came across a pirate ship by chance and began life as a pirate. During a treasure hunt, Ata acquired a rare treasure, the Soul Pearl, which he combined with the remains of sea beasts to create a unique weapon that has since become a terror of the seas. The white anchor he carries, another treasure wrestled from the sea, serves as a symbol of his bravery. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Child of the Sea [ edit ] Child of the Sea Passive Skill Ability Type Low Health Recovery Damage Physical His lost Health is preserved in a temporary Health buffer . Dealing damage converts buffered Health into actual Health. After a while, the buffered Health will begin to gradually diminish. His Basic Attacks deal extra damage . Skill 1: Wavewalking [ edit ] Wavewalking Skill 1 Ability Type Crowd Control Immunity Damage Physical Leaps into the air and slams down twice, dealing damage with each slam. The second slam launched enemies. Gains crowd control immunity while using the skill. Skill 2: Sea Anchor [ edit ] Sea Anchor Skill 2 Ability Type Crowd Control Movement Damage Physical Hurls an anchor in the target direction, dealing damage and slowing enemies. If the anchor hits terrain, he will be dragged to the contact point, dealing damage and knocking back enemies. His next Basic Attack will be enhanced with a pulling effect. Skill 3: Ghost Ship [ edit ] Ghost Ship Skill 3 Ability Type Terrain Immunity Damage Physical Builds temporary terrain along the outer edge of a cone-shaped area, dealing damage to enemies within it. Gains crowd control immunity while using the skill. He can use the skill again to make the temporary terrain disappear early. Splash Arts [ edit ] HoK AoV Show All White Anchor High Tide Tales of Victory White Anchor Classic High Tide Meow-haw Kazell Rebuilder Rain Walker Utopian Endgame Lizard Master Sushi Chef See Also [ edit ] Zhu Bajie (HoK CN hero with similar skillset) <div class="

hero_108.name: Umbrosa
hero_108.text: mw-content-text" class="mw-body-content"> Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Umbrosa Dark Feathered Austren General Information Lane: Clash Lane Jungler Role: Fighter Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 334 Wins : 402 Loses (45.38%) Light and shadow, a tapestry of fates interwoven. Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Whirling Featherblades 2.2 Skill 1: Feverish Dance 2.3 Skill 2: Feathered Tempest 2.4 Skill 3: Final Frenzy 3 Splash Arts Introduction [ edit ] Unlike the rumored Bird Tribe of Misty Marshes, Umbrosa possesses neither sacred wings nor noble character. Only the golden sunlight reflected in her pupils connects her to her past, indicating that she was once the seer Austren. However, when the Bird Tribe fell, she buried that identity along with it. Now, having returned from the abyss, the tattered and scarred Umbrosa has lost everything. In her madness, she imagines that if she can destroy “the root of all evil”, she might be able to restore the true light of the Misty Marshes. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Whirling Featherblades [ edit ] Whirling Featherblades Passive Skill Ability Type Mark Damage Physical When attacking at a distance, Basic Attacks throw a blade that returns to her. She can hit the blade as it returns to bounce it back at the enemy, dealing increased damage with each rebound. When attacking nearby targets, she enters melee mode and attacks faster. Basic Attacks mark targets. Marked enemies take extra damage from Skill 2. Skill 1: Feverish Dance [ edit ] Feverish Dance Skill 1 Ability Type Enhance Slow Damage Physical Sweeps the surrounding area, damaging and slowing nearby enemies. Then enter Frenzied state, gaining a major boost to Movement Speed and Attack Speed . Skill 2: Feathered Tempest [ edit ] Feathered Tempest Skill 2 Ability Type Recovery Movement Damage Physical Dashes forward, damaging and knocking back enemies. Also triggers Featherblade marks and spreads them to nearby enemies. Then, throws rebounding blades at enemies in front, dealing damage and rocovering Health . Each hit consumes 1 mark to deal extra damage . Skill 3: Final Frenzy [ edit ] Final Frenzy Skill 3 Ability Type Indomitable Enhance Damage Physical Damages nearby enemies and gains Movement Speed . Also enters the Indomitable state for 4s, gaining temporary Health. If she is eliminated while this skill is not on cooldown, she resurrects after a short delay, damaging nearby enemies. The skill will then enter cooldown. Passive: Upgrading this skill increases Skill 2 and melee Basic Attack damage. The Indomitable state ends immediately if she loses all of her temporary Health. Splash Arts [ edit ] Global Chinese Show All Dark Feathered Austren Classic Scarlet Fiend 百相守梦 <div class="
